task_completion.description: Verify the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' is opened in the project management software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the project title 'Enterprise Software Development Project' in the application window title bar or the main project summary task.

task_completion.description: Verify the Gantt Chart view displays the required columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the column headers in the Gantt Chart view. You should see 'Indicators' (often an icon column), 'Name', 'Cost', and 'Percent Complete' (or '% Complete').

task_completion.description: Verify that forbidden columns are hidden from the Gantt Chart view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the column headers. 'Duration', 'Start', 'Finish', 'Predecessors', and 'Resource Names' MUST NOT be visible in the table.

task_completion.description: Verify the tasks are sorted by Cost in descending order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the values in the 'Cost' column. The numbers should be ordered from highest to lowest (descending order) from top to bottom.

task_completion.description: Verify the report is exported as a PDF to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save as PDF' or 'Print to PDF' dialog saving to '/home/ga/Desktop/top_cost_report.pdf', or a file manager showing 'top_cost_report.pdf' on the Desktop, or a PDF viewer displaying the final report.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the project management software's GUI to configure columns and sort.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the software's column configuration dialogs, sorting menus, or right-click context menus being used.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's print or export functionality rather than terminal commands to create the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the application's 'Print' or 'Export to PDF' dialog box, rather than terminal commands like 'touch' or 'wkhtmltopdf'.

integrity.description: Verify the data being manipulated belongs to the actual project management software and wasn't manually typed into a spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be a project management tool (like ProjectLibre) with a Gantt chart timeline visible on the right side of the task table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exported PDF must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Desktop/top_cost_report.pdf'. The Gantt Chart view must include 'Name' and 'Cost' columns, and MUST NOT show 'Start', 'Finish', 'Predecessors', or 'Duration'. The tasks must be sorted by the 'Cost' column in descending order (highest cost at the top).
